title: gnaphalium lamarckii
intro: Gnaphalium lamarckii, also known as Pyrethrum or Chrysanthemum coccineum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds. Gnaphalium lamarckii has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and acting as an antimicrobial agent to combat infections. The plant's medicinal properties can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
